label: 2013-2017 Foundation of Representation and Sequence Modeling
summary: From word embeddings and RNN/LSTM systems to early attention and transformer ideas.

label: 2018-2022 Pretraining and Architecture Boom
summary: Transformer-based pretraining scaled rapidly with BERT and GPT style models.

label: 2023-2026 Alignment, Agents, and Multimodal Fusion
summary: RLHF, agent workflows, and multimodal systems become the main research direction.
